# EcoGuide AI

EcoGuide AI is a Cheonan-specific waste disposal assistant. This repository is currently documentation-first and is designed to be readable by both humans and AI coding agents.

Start here, in order:

- README.md
- AGENTS.md
- docs/README.md
- docs/PRD.md
- docs/TECH_SPEC.md
- docs/API_GUIDE.md
- docs/PROMPT_AND_GUARDRAILS.md
- docs/IMPLEMENTATION_BACKLOG.md
- data/catalog/source_catalog.yaml
- specs/openapi.yaml

Project goal:

- Answer waste disposal questions for Cheonan residents using official sources.
- Accept text and optional image input.
- Return a disposal decision, reason, preparation steps, citations, and a follow-up question when needed.

Current state:

- Repository bootstrap is documentation-first.
- App code has not been scaffolded yet.
- Interface and workflow specs are already defined.

Authoritative sources:

- Requirements/인공지능.pdf
- Requirements/[인공지능 4팀] 추진보고서_20214318_이병현hwp.pdf
- DataSet/재활용품 분리배출 가이드라인(웹용)-최종.pdf
- https://www.me.go.kr/m/mob/board/read.do%3Bjsessionid%3D6ZEOzR00wQsaUCjfdc9jAKQX7RCjYe41HeKW8xgk.mehome1?boardCategoryId=&boardId=875840&boardMasterId=54&maxIndexPages=10&maxPageItems=10&menuId=51&orgCd=&pagerOffset=0&searchKey=&searchValue=
- https://lll.cheonan.go.kr/kor/sub06_13_06.do

Planned public interfaces:

- GET /api/health
- POST /api/chat
- Local ingestion workflow for official source documents

Rules:

- Do not invent disposal rules.
- Prefer clarification over unsupported certainty.
- Keep docs, schemas, and code aligned.
- Treat official sources as higher priority than prompt wording.
